texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: * 5$ per person per night from the HB rate
texts.text: * 5$ per person per night from the HB rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Under 2 years sharing room with 1 or 2 Adults = Free of charge.
texts.text: Under 2 years sharing room with 1 or 2 Adults = Free of charge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * 1 Adult + 1 Child (2 - 12 yrs sharing room = Adult pays single rate & child pays 30% of rate.
texts.text: 1 Adult + 1 Child (2 - 12 yrs sharing room = Adult pays single rate & child pays 30% of rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * 1 Adult + 2 Children(2 - 12 yrs) sharing room = adult pays half double rate, each child pays 50% of the adult rate
texts.text: 1 Adult + 2 Children(2 - 12 yrs) sharing room = adult pays half double rate, each child pays 50% of the adult rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * For children occupying own room (min. 2) = 75% of adult (half double) rate per child per day.
texts.text: For children occupying own room (min. 2) = 75% of adult (half double) rate per child per day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Christmas + New Year eve Suppl. (on 24th Dec & 31st Dec) = 20 $ per person/day.
texts.text: Christmas + New Year eve Suppl. (on 24th Dec & 31st Dec) = 20 $ per person/day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Children (2 to under 12yrs) = 50% of the supplement.
texts.text: Children (2 to under 12yrs) = 50% of the supplement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Minimum stay 3 nights throughout the year for all allotments .
texts.text: Minimum stay 3 nights throughout the year for all allotments .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * all rates may be subject to changes with 7 days notice .
texts.text: all rates may be subject to changes with 7 days notice .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Liabilities , injuries and loss of life  are covered through Kenyan insurance.
texts.text: Liabilities , injuries and loss of life  are covered through Kenyan insurance.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * For cancellation from 5 to 3 days - One full day rate is charged.
texts.text: For cancellation from 5 to 3 days - One full day rate is charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * In the case of a No Show - Three days full rate is charged.
texts.text: In the case of a No Show - Three days full rate is charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * all payments must be settled in full prior to departure of clients . Failure to do so shall lead to clients being charged directly.
texts.text: all payments must be settled in full prior to departure of clients . Failure to do so shall lead to clients being charged directly.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * all advertising material ( i.e. pictures /  videos ) provided are copy right of Bahari Beach Hotel and shall only be used in direct relation to Bahari Beach Hotel. Misappropriation of the same is strictly forbidden and may lead to legal implications.
texts.text: all advertising material ( i.e. pictures /  videos ) provided are copy right of Bahari Beach Hotel and shall only be used in direct relation to Bahari Beach Hotel. Misappropriation of the same is strictly forbidden and may lead to legal implications.
